explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: A customer story references data protection policies. It also references vendor oversight policies, specifically through mentions of AI security and scalability.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This InMoment customer story provides evidence for the governance and privacy pillars. The case study implies data protection and vendor oversight policies through mentions of AI security and scalability.
relevant_sources.title: InMoment Customer Story: Foot Locker

oversight.findings: A privacy policy document for job candidates states that Foot Locker does not use automated decision-making in their hiring process. This document describes that all hiring decisions involve human intervention from relevant departments, including Human Resources.
oversight.path_to_improvement: Publish override mechanisms, escalation processes, or appeal workflows.

relevant_sources.summary: This privacy policy document for job candidates in the UK provides evidence for the **oversight** pillar. It explicitly states that Foot Locker does not use automated decision-making in their hiring process, with all decisions involving human intervention from relevant departments, including Human Resources. This commitment to human review demonstrates a mechanism for oversight in their recruitment practices.
relevant_sources.title: Privacy Candidates (UK)

privacy.findings: A customer story references data protection policies. It also references vendor oversight policies, specifically through mentions of AI security and scalability.
privacy.path_to_improvement: Publish AI-specific privacy impact assessments or data handling procedures.

relevant_sources.summary: This InMoment customer story provides evidence for the governance and privacy pillars. The case study implies data protection and vendor oversight policies through mentions of AI security and scalability.
relevant_sources.title: InMoment Customer Story: Foot Locker

transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

summary.overall_findings: Foot Locker's public disclosures address oversight, noting that its privacy policy states the company does not use automated decision-making in its hiring process and that all hiring decisions involve human intervention from relevant departments. These materials also reference privacy and governance through customer stories that mention data protection and vendor oversight policies, addressing 3 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. This assessment is based on a review of 10 publicly available sources. No qualifying public evidence was found for transparency, fairness, and 2 additional pillars.
